user.title: Krüger Secomat
user.description: Enter your Secomat claim token. You can obtain it by intercepting the Secomat app traffic with mitmproxy.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid claim token - could not connect to Secomat.

start_drying.name: Start Drying
start_drying.description: Start manual laundry drying, optionally delayed.

delay_seconds.name: Delay
delay_seconds.description: Seconds from now until the drying program starts. 0 means start immediately.
